name: @lucide-react-taro/monorepo
description: Workspace root for lucide-react-taro and its CLI packages

scripts.build:cli: pnpm --filter taro-lucide-tabbar build && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-find build && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-show build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm run build:docs
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter lucide-react-taro clean && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-tabbar clean && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-find clean && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-show clean && rm -rf docs/dist .lucide-cache
scripts.publish:lib: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm --filter lucide-react-taro publish --access public
scripts.publish:cli: pnpm run build:cli && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-tabbar publish --access public && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-find publish --access public && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-show publish --access public
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run bump:patch && pnpm run publish
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run bump:minor && pnpm run publish
scripts.release:major: pnpm run bump:major && pnpm run publish
scripts.test: pnpm --filter lucide-react-taro test && pnpm --filter taro-lucide-tabbar test
scripts.dev:docs: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm -C docs dev
